textPlain: was working on something similar to this last week, but i ended up going with SSE instead of websockets for the control channel.the goal was to use webauthn to authenticate ssh sessions from the browser with a charm/wish ssh app backend.
Hi all, I'm the author of this article. Happy to answer any questions.
Not a question, but Zellij is awesome! This looks like a great new feature, too. :)
